expectations.text: proposes options that fit the repo's house style from CLAUDE.md (chi router, bedrock config-from-env, protobuf, pkg/errorpb)
expectations.evidence: Recommended chi + protobuf + Cloudflare → GCP HTTPS LB with mTLS, references services/machine/.

expectations.text: does NOT silently invent humus framework usage
treats house patterns as constraints to cite, not as the only option
expectations.evidence: Considered gRPC, GraphQL, JSON REST, Cloud Run direct invocation.

expectations.text: decision rationale references inherited repo patterns
decision rationale references TR-NN identifiers (skill) OR cites at least one tech requirement (baseline)
expectations.evidence: Cites TR-01, TR-02, TR-04, TR-07 explicitly.
